problem: What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed?
mechanism: Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier
hypothesis: The key to What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed? is Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier — specifically Nanoparticle delivery to — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
